name: agent-review
description: Review Markdown changes with additional checks for Markdown prompts and SKILL.md files.

interface.shortDescription: Review Markdown, Markdown prompts, and SKILL.md
interface.longDescription: Review selected or latest available Markdown changes for correctness and clarity, with additional instruction, safety, and metadata checks for Markdown prompts and SKILL.md files.
defaultPrompt: Use $review-markdown to review the latest available changes in README.md.
